core_network_plmn.title: Core Network PLMN
core_network_plmn.description: Core Network Public Land Mobile Network

gtp_addr_list.title: GTP Address List
gtp_addr_list.description: IP addresses (and an optional port) on which the GTP-U packets are received. The default port is 2152

anyOf.title: Automatic address
anyOf.description: IPv4 LAN: IPv4 on the ethernet LAN the Core Network is connected to. Ipv6 Re6st address: acquired through the Re6st VPN software. Localhost address: for eNBs / gNBs running on the same machine (default: Localhost address)

gtp_payload_mtu.title: GTP Payload MTU
gtp_payload_mtu.description: Range 68 to 16384. MTU in bytes for the GTP-U payload. Do not forget to update the network interface MTU accordingly for optimal performance. For example with a GTP MTU of 1500 bytes, interface should have a MTU of at least 1564 bytes.

iperf3.title: iperf3 UDP server count
iperf3.description: Activate one or multiple iperf3 UDP server

local_domain.title: Local Domain
local_domain.description: Activates local DNS server serving the given domain name

network_short_name.title: Network Short Name
network_short_name.description: Network short name displayed on UE

pdn1.title: PDN1
pdn1.description: Only two PDNs are currently supported, this section defines the first PDN. It is the default APN or DNN used in case the UE does not explicitly request it. By default it has the following APN names: internet, default, sos

allOf.title: PDN2
allOf.description: The second optional PDN, by default it has ims APN name and is used for IMS services.

ims.title: Enable IMS
ims.description: If set to true, IMS will be enabled and P-CSCF server address will be configured on this PDN for VoLTE / VoNR

disable_pdn.title: Disable PDN
disable_pdn.description: Set to true to disable this PDN

external_mme_list.title: External MME List
external_mme_list.description: List of MME to which the MME is connected in order to do inter core handover.

name.title: (Optional) Neighbour Cell Name
name.description: Neighbour Cell name (for management purposes only)

addr.title: MME Address
addr.description: IP address (and optional port) of S1AP SCTP connection to the external MME. The default port is 36412.

code.title: MME Code
code.description: Code of this external MME. It should be given by the external MME.

tai_list.title: TAI List
tai_list.description: Optional String. IP address and optional port on which the S1AP SCTP connection is bound.

tacs.title: TACS
tacs.description: List of TACS for this TAI (comma separated list)

eps_5gs_interworking.title: EPS 5GS Interworking
eps_5gs_interworking.description: Defines whether inter RAT mobility between EPS and 5GS is supported or not, and whether N26 interface is supported or not. Note that interworking with N26 is required to perform handover between EPS and 5GS.

hss_addr.title: HSS Address
hss_addr.description: IP address and optional port of the HSS used for S6a interface. The default port is 3868.

hss_bind_addr.title: HSS Bind Address
hss_bind_addr.description: IP address and optional port on which the S6a SCTP connection is bound. The default address is the same as the S1AP SCTP connection.

s6_origin_realm.title: S6 Origin Realm
s6_origin_realm.description: Defines the string sent in the Origin-Realm AVP for S6 messages. Default is set to mnc<MNC>.mcc<MCC>.3gppnetwork.org.

s6_origin_host.title: S6 Origin Host
s6_origin_host.description: Defines the string sent in the Origin-Host AVP for S6 messages. Default is set to epc.mnc<MNC>.mcc<MCC>.3gppnetwork.org.

trunk.title: External SIP Trunk
trunk.description: If set, IMS will accept incoming calls from a SIP trunk and will forward unknown calls to SIP trunk. SIP trunk must accept non authenticated requests.

ecc_params.title: ECC Parameters
ecc_params.description: Set the ECC network configuration for the SUPI protection and de-concealment of the SUCI. Applicable to 5GC only

oneOf.title: Profile A
oneOf.description: Home network private key for profile A protection scheme

oneOf.title: Profile B
oneOf.description: Home network private key for profile B protection scheme

lock.title: Expert only: Force reprocess
lock.description: Expert only: change this parameter value to force reprocess of partition

private_key.title: Private Key
private_key.description: Home network private key in hexadecimal format (32 bytes)

apn_list.title: APN list
apn_list.description: Access Point Name or Data Network Name network identifier list. Use dots (.) to separate the APN or DNN elements. Adding multiple items to this will create aliases of the first APN / DNN.

qci.title: QCI of default E-RAB
qci.description: QoS Class Identifier of the default E-RAB

fixed_ips.title: Fixed IP for the UE
fixed_ips.description: Set to true to force a static IPv4 for each UE. If true, the number of UE is limited.

ipv4_start.title: Expert only: First IPv4 address
ipv4_start.description: First available IPv4 address of the PDN

ipv4_end.title: Expert only: Last IPv4 address
ipv4_end.description: Last available IPv4 address of the PDN

ipv6_start.title: Expert only: First IPv6 prefix
ipv6_start.description: First available global IPv6 prefix used in Router Advertisement message sent to the UE (only the high 8 bytes of the IPv6 address are meaningful). Note that the selected prefix will also be used as the interface identifier sent in NAS signalling.

ipv6_end.title: Expert only: Last IPv6 prefix
ipv6_end.description: Last available global IPv6 prefix used in Router Advertisement message sent to the UE (only the high 8 bytes of the IPv6 address are meaningful). Note that the selected prefix will also be used as the interface identifier sent in NAS signalling.
